ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider for the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_categories" (
  "risk_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk category */,
  "thresholds" TEXT /* Numerical thresholds for the risk category */,
  "description_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the risk category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age that defines this age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages that define the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to age group */,
  "risk_cat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to risk category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric */,
  "risk_value" REAL /* Numerical value of the risk metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the risk metric data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the provider */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation with specific hospitals or clinics */,
  "practice_location" TEXT /* Location where the provider practices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the lab test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the lab test */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab that conducted the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test */,
  "test_results_date" TEXT /* Date when the test results were finalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication prescription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication prescription */,
  "prescription_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions related to the medication prescription */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining for the medication */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who prescribed the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, doctor, nurse) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the history entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the history entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the history entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_histories_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was administered */,
  "administered_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider who administered the vaccine */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number of the vaccination */,
  "next_dose_due" TEXT /* Date when the next dose is due */,
  "vaccination_site" TEXT /* Site where the vaccination was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_administered_by FOREIGN KEY ("administered_by") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency contact */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the contact */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_contacts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "specialist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialist provider */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date when the referral was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the referral */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the referral */,
  "referral_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions related to the referral */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a follow-up is required after the referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_specialist_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialist_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the follow-up */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up appointment */,
  "follow_up_type" TEXT /* Type of follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "notified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who generated the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_notified_by FOREIGN KEY ("notified_by") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
